pieces.title: Trump-Xi summit closes with three-year 'strategic stability' framework but few specifics
pieces.standfirst: Trump's May 13–15 Beijing visit produced a process — a 'strategic stability' framework for three years and a September return visit — without resolving Taiwan, AI export controls, or rare earths.
